name: rubric lock file pins the rubric version that profile snapshots were computed against
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf '{"profile_snapshot_hash":"abc","rubric_version":"1.5.3"}\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/lock.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/version-check.sh" --lock .claude-tdd-pro/lock.json 2>out.txt && grep -q 'lock_rubric_version=1.5.3' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
